response:
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM flights AS T1
INNER JOIN airports AS T2
  ON T1.departure_airport_id = T2.airport_id
INNER JOIN cities AS T3
  ON T2.city_id = T3.city_id
INNER JOIN airports AS T4
  ON T1.destination_airport_id = T4.airport_id
INNER JOIN cities AS T5
  ON T4.city_id = T5.city_id
WHERE
  T3.city_name = 'Aberdeen' AND T5.city_name = 'Ashley';
```
